name: Creole Daube Glace'
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice olives and arrange in the bottom of a 6-cup mold.
2. Carefully sprinkle beef over olives.
3. In a large bowl, mix gelatin and 1/2 cup of the beef broth.
4. Heat remaining broth to boiling; add to gelatin mixture and stir until gelatin is completely dissolved.
5. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Chill just until mixture reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites, then pour over olives and meat in mold.
7. Chill until firm; unmold to serve.
